title: T-038 — Lot genealogy recursive-CTE trace service (WH §11.2, §11.5)
prompt:
# T-038 — Lot genealogy recursive-CTE trace service (WH §11.2, §11.5)

PRD: docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md §11.2, §11.5
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement `traceGenealogy({seed_lp_id, mode: 'forward'|'backward'|'full', max_depth: 10})` using the §11.2 recursive CTE. SLO <30 s for depth ≤10 over 100k LPs. RLS-respecting + depth guard (V-WH-TRACE-005).

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/genealogy-trace.ts`: function returning `{nodes: [{lp_id, lp_number, product_id, wo_id, depth}], edges: [{from, to, operation_type, at}], metadata: {node_count, query_ms}}`.
2. Uses two recursive CTEs (forward via `g.parent_lp_id=ft.id`, backward via `g.child_lp_id=bt.id`) per §11.2.
3. Depth hard-cap at `max_depth` (default 10).
4. Tenant_id filter on every CTE step (RLS guards but explicit also).
5. Annotates each node with `fefo_compliant` flag (joins pick_overrides on the consume operation).

## Files
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/genealogy-trace.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/genealogy-trace.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a 5-level genealogy chain, when traced forward from root with depth=5, then all 5 LPs returned with correct depth labels.
2. Given depth=20 is requested, when called, then service clamps to 10 and emits a warning in metadata (V-WH-TRACE-005).
3. Given a 100k-LP seeded DB, when traced (depth=10), then P95 <30 s with the indexes.
4. Given tenant B reads tenant A's seed_lp, when called as tenant B, then service returns 'not found' (RLS).

## Test strategy
- RED: `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/genealogy-trace.test.ts` asserting forward/backward/full modes, depth cap, RLS, FEFO annotation, perf smoke.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test genealogy-trace`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip the depth cap (V-WH-TRACE-005 — runaway recursion risk).
- Do not bypass tenant filter even with RLS on (defence in depth).
- Do not return rows from `is_reversed=true` genealogy without flagging.

## Dependencies
- T-003
- T-011
- T-012
